description_long: This fence consists of a dense row of interlocking, X-shaped concrete or stone blocks, arranged in a linear formation. The structure appears robust and is likely designed to serve as a heavy-duty barrier, possibly for coastal or industrial urban environments. The top edge of the fence is irregular and jagged, following the contours of the interlocked blocks, giving it a rugged appearance. The surface is rough and weathered, with a mix of gray and blueish tones, possibly due to exposure to the elements or water. There are no visible decorative elements or post caps, and the fence lacks any gates or openings. The base is broad and solid, suggesting it is fixed and not intended to be moved.
description: A rugged, interlocking concrete or stone fence with a jagged top edge and rough, weathered surface, designed as a heavy-duty urban barrier.
description_view_0: The fence is seen from the side, showing the full length of the interlocked X-shaped blocks and the irregular, jagged top edge.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the thickness and depth of the fence, as well as the rough, blocky texture of the material.
description_view_2: A direct top-down view reveals the linear arrangement and the continuous, uneven top profile of the fence.
description_view_3: From the end, the fence appears as a narrow, pointed structure, emphasizing its solid, impenetrable construction.
